payload.event_name: Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk
payload.description: MTA employees united with the American Cancer Society for the Making Strides Against Breast Cancer Walk to raise funds and awareness. 30th anniversary, took place in Central Park.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Empowering Women in Transportation – Breast Cancer Awareness Walk - October 15, 2023

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: A winter toy and coat drive to benefit The Henry Street Settlement and The Bronx Defenders.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All Generational – Winter Toy and Coat Drive – November 1- December 8, 2023

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.description: The Veterans ERG held a luncheon ceremony to commemorate Veterans Day. Veterans were joined by MTA Veterans, Chairman Janno Lieber, Executive Sponsors, and employees.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Veterans - Veterans Day Ceremony November 8, 2023

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.claim_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for females is in the Protective Service and Service Maintenance categories. The Transit Property Protection Agent and Bus Operator job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities and strategies have been put in place to address utilization in these categories.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Predominate areas of underutilization for females is in the Protective Service and Service Maintenance categories. The Transit Property Protection Agent and Bus Operator job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities

payload.claim_text: Predominate areas of underutilization for minority males were in the Service Maintenance category. The Cleaner and Station Agent job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Predominate areas of underutilization for minority males were in the Service Maintenance category. The Cleaner and Station Agent job titles were identified as areas of greatest opportunities.

payload.claim_text: All Females underrepresentation occurred in: Professions – Whites; Technicians – Whites; Protective Services – Hispanics, Asians, Whites; Service Maintenance – Hispanics, Asians, Whites. Minority Males underrepresentation occurred in: Officials and Administrators – Blacks; Technicians – Hispanics; Service Maintenance – Hispanics.

evidence_refs.source_quote: the underrepresentation for females and minorities occurred in the following EEO categories

payload.description: A conversation Across Generations – embracing generational perspectives at the MTA. The panel included members of all five generations.

evidence_refs.source_quote: All Generational – Generations in the Workforce – September 26, 2023

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.

payload.claim_text: Employee Resource Groups (ERGs) are important pillars of the MTA and contribute to a culture of inclusion and belonging while making a positive impact on the MTA. For the remainder of the year, we focused on the MTA Strategic Priority Revive Talent and Culture with an emphasis on belonging, health and well being.
